item.title: Everything is chaos including these memes I have to get off my phone #2
item.description:
My Kitty's name was Mozzarella, but usually I called her Ella.
I think I uploaded some in #1 without sound. Sorry to all 5 people who may have seen that! Also, the unintended theme of this appears to be cats and relationships. I used to have both, but now I just have a cat that my parents are looking after right now because they have a big yard, and I don't.
item.dc:creator: tibby

item.title: Memes will keep us together
item.description:
SAY IT! Dr. Vladenfurter
Romance?
.
And why not is this?
The more you know.
.
Rumblie in your tumbly
Calm down, Sheila!
I would wear these clothes.
Let's make them DARKER.
Accurate.
I don't know why this makes you feel better but you do you, boo.
.
Yes please and also now.
.
.
Or now. Now is also good.
.
Heh.
.
.
.
Damn right.
Every time.
My life.
Sit up straight. Spidey commands.
Looking up recipe now.
Truth.
Clippy is everso helpful.
Yup.
.
Thanks Marie Callander.
.
Teeheehee
Accurate update.
Me in a nutshell.
I heart you, imgur.
.
Hyuk.
*grin*
.
You know this pain.
.
.
Old school
You can hear this in his voice.
It's you
I have this and I'm obsessed with it.
Legit.
Cat tax!
item.dc:creator: jennytornado

item.title: The second recovery of Nanna
item.description:
Hi everyone, I'm MrPuckett
This is Nanna, the 16 year old hospice dog I adopted last year Blind, terminal heart disease and a whole list of health problems, she made some incredible progress over the first 8 months at home.
A few weeks ago I posted after Nanna had a stroke. I thought we had our final days together it was absolutely devastating. With a lot of help from Nashville Humane, Nanna made some huge improvements and was almost back to the dog I knew before the stroke.
2 major comebacks for a senior dog that many shelters would've just put down. She was in such a bad state when she was surrender at 15 that even I questioned whether she would ever have a quality life. I figured it was time to update everyone on how she's been doing since the stroke recovery -
EVEN BETTER THAN SHE WAS DOING BEFORE THE STROKE ＼(°o°)／ Here's a video of our first walk together, every painful step, and at the end a clip from our most recent walk
The first mile she ever walked with me took over an hour, a ridiculously slow pace Last weekend she had her longest walk ever as a Puckett!
She's also twice as fast now!!! She's regained most of her balance since the stroke, has been eating and sleeping well and still every month cuddles a little more than the month before.
I started fundraising for the Humane Association with the last post, one of you even donated $2,000 it was amazing. They do so much not only to locate and bring in homeless or mistreated animals, but they've also provided Nanna's extensive medical care every step of the way. It's because of them she got a 2nd and 3rd chance at life, a chance to finally know what it's like to be loved so dearly.
At the end of the fundraiser, 200 people and 100 dogs get together to run a 5k, it's an absolute dream come true it's so fun
Guess who was the fastest dog under 20lbs last year!!!
This year I'm going to take Nanna and shoot for her first ever 5k walk, they even have an award for 'Slowest Dog' It'll be an insane milestone for a hospice dog that could barely walk around the block last summer.
These two just completed their 55th straight Sunday with a 13 mile run or longer They'll sit this one out, but they've gotten so close to Nanna I know they'll be proud of her. The way they bombard her with love when she comes back from a walk is the most wholesome thing in my life.
So we got her all groomed up and ready to train For a dog that's made some incredible progress over the first 8 months, I'm certain that she'll make even more with her time left on this planet.
I can't thank the Humane Association enough for believing this dog had a chance at a great life, and making sure it happened every step of the way. I promised myself I wouldn't get too attached to a dog that doesn't have much time left, and I failed miserably at that promise. She's an important part of our family, and has taught me more about patience and perseverance than I ever thought possible. She's made me a better person.
This is my 16 year old puppy Nanna, she still has the most amazing days ahead of her. .... If you'd like to support the Humane Association in continuing to rescue dogs like Nanna, check out my fundraiser on their page here https://www.classy.org/fundraiser/3793511 ... Thank you for reading my post. I have the day off work and will again be hugging Nanna for every comment below.
item.dc:creator: MrPuckett

item.dc:creator: Joyika

item.title: Hardest decision I've ever made in my life.
item.description: Someone can only take the abuse for so long. The truth is, I'm not in a good space mentally and my wife only makes it worse with her constant belittling. I feel betrayed by the lies she told me before we got married. She thinks my hobbies aren't charming, but childish. She thinks my music is loud and obnoxious instead of unique and charming. She pushed me to make job changes I never wanted because they paid more so she could eventually quit. More than anything my dreams which seemed an attractive trait to her was actually something the couldn't stand the idea of. Everything she ever did in our relationship was to try and conince me that she could just stop working and become a mother, when neither of us are ready. When she was so angry at me she quit her job to stay with her family out of state "to cool off" and shorted us on money for the month so I can't pay bills, I knew that was it. Wish me luck guys, because I'm short on cash, short on patience and short on happiness. I I'd give anything to just escape this hell for a day. Edit 1: For the record, I did not initially text her "I want a divorce" . I called her before she got on her flight to go visit her parents. Money for the flight was taken out of our account, putting us in the red. She said she doesn't care if I end up not able to pay bills, that I can "let the food in the fridge rot" when the electric bill comes due, for all she cares. I told her she doesn't care about me and if she gets on this flight, it's over. She thought I was bluffing, went to washington, I packed all her stuff and told her it's in a small 10 dollar storage unit. She flipped. Edit 2: Sorry for being slow on all the replies, guys! I'm working and concrete pouring doesn't leave a lot of time to get on your phone. Edit 3: Most viral! thanks fellas, I was just yelling into the voice a little. since people have asked, I'm not in a position to really deny any charity at the moment. My wife's really stiffed us on bills. https://www.gofundme.com/f/help-jay-pay-for-bills-and-get-his-feet-under-him?utm_source=customer&utm_medium=copy_link&utm_campaign=p_cf+share-flow-1
item.dc:creator: AndreHagrid

item.title: Awesome free database of insurrectionists! A lot are running for office. Sound on! Insurrectionindex.org
item.description: HT to @trippingthelightfantastic This was kinda cool. I searched by my state expecting to see at least one person I know there, but was didn’t find anyone. Lots of famous peeps there, though. Insurrectionindex.org

item.title: Pencil sketch I just made, titled “Why can’t you be more like your father?”
item.description: A moment of silence occurs, and I remain without any expression. “Dumpling, I am sorry. I shouldn’t had said that.” “Mom, it’s fine. You tell me often.”

item.title: My Congressman is Retiring
item.description: This is House Rep. Fred Upton from Michigan. He has been my representative since I moved here, and has been in politics since I was born. He announced his retirement earlier this year. In an interview, he explained that his decision is in part motivated by death threats that he and his family have been receiving because of his voting record, particularly his vote to impeach then pres. Trump, and his votes with the problem solvers caucus. Doesn't feel like "just politics." I fear who is going to take his place. The candidate field is...not great. EDIT: thanks for most viral. I wish that my first viral post was not so...whatever this is.
item.dc:creator: songbringer

item.title: Wow. Just wow.
item.description: He’s 61. That seems crazy. https://www.thedailybeast.com/msnbc-analyst-malcolm-nance-joins-the-fight-in-ukraine Edit to add information on how the Geneva convention considers journalists civilians in war zones & how taking up arms impacts that status. https://casebook.icrc.org/case-study/protection-journalists
item.dc:creator: Mbcb350

item.title: Down from 300lbs to 173lbs in 17 months
item.description:
Howdy, ya'll! Loin lamb chops seasoned with Penzey's Parisian Herb blend, garlic powder and pink salt and seared in ghee Diced shallots, 2 minced garlic cloves, and 1 big dice portabella mushroom sauteed in ghee at a medium low heat. Once tender I stir in the baby spinach until gently wilted Sweet potato medallions microwaved for 5 minutes then seared in the ghee that is left over from the lamb. All that lamb goodness saturates the sweet potatoes in a special kind of way! Nightly apple cider vinegar cocktail. 1 tbsp ACV diluted with 2oz pedialyte and 14oz water
Sound on for a little ASMR action, if it qualifies. Notice the giant glass lid propped up on the left to catch splatter.
The preshow! It's not often I cook a $20 dollar meal. Had to treat myself for paying off another credit card!
December 2020 296lbs after losing 5lbs just walking 1 hour a day for a few weeks. I was still eating like a dumpster animal and was having about 10 vodka drinks a night. An hour walk was so brutal then. I could hardly move. I just ran a eight and half mile tonight! For reference, I only began running 9 months into my journey.
Fresh after my workout! 173lbs! Probably way less when I wake up. 20 minutes treadmill. 1 mile was at 8minutes 30seconds followed by a five minute cool down. Then, 15 minutes of 30lbs kettlebell swings, clean and press, halos, around the worlds, and figure 8's between my legs. ****WARNING**** The link below is a picture of me without a shirt and a graphic description of the hidradenitis flare up I'm currently having. https://imgur.com/a/W7evwL9 I have some minor body dysmorphia and I'm using this opportunity as therapy. Also, putting myself out there like this can encourage body positivity and maybe motivate someone. It's amazing what you can accomplish if you take fear out of the equation. I have no shame. I'm proud of this body! However, sometimes I can't help but find myself disgusting.
So, if I've offended your eyes with my body please accept this shot as an apology. Just the way I like it; cooked medium to perfection! Damn I'm good! Shit well, my friends!
item.dc:creator: TasteOfNoise
